name: pi-task-panel
description: Persistent Claude-style task/todo panel for Pi with slash commands and a structured todo_write tool.

settings.label: Enable task panel
settings.description: Register todo_write, /todo, task panel widgets, reminders, and shortcuts.

settings.label: Default panel state
settings.description: Panel state when tasks first appear.

settings.label: Use Ctrl+T for tasks
settings.description: Register Ctrl+T for task panel visibility. Pi normally uses Ctrl+T for thinking visibility, so this requires reload and explicit opt-in.

settings.label: Alternate shortcut
settings.description: Always-available task panel shortcut when Ctrl+T is not taken over. Cycles hidden → show compact → show all.

settings.label: Compact task count
settings.description: Maximum tasks shown in compact mode.

settings.label: Show active notes
settings.description: Show notes for the active task in expanded panel mode.

settings.label: Auto-show on first task
settings.description: Show the compact panel automatically when the first task is added.

settings.label: Compact todo_write output
settings.description: Render todo_write results as a single inline status row instead of Pi's padded tool box.

settings.label: Task workflow reminders
settings.description: Remind the agent to start tasks before focused work, mark tasks done/drop when status changes, and add discovered follow-ups.

settings.label: Incomplete-task reminders
settings.description: Show a subtle reminder when an agent turn ends with incomplete tasks.
